EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IAffineTransformation2D2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that define and manipulate affine transformations.

[Guid("8BEDCE87-6CEE-4E7B-9D17-73B3562E9AE6")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAffineTransformation2D2 : IAffineTransformation2D, ITransformation

IsReflective 

bool IsReflective { get; }

Property Value

bool

MoveOrigin 

IPoint MoveOrigin { set; }

Property Value

IPoint

MoveOrigin_2

The origin of accumulated transformations used when projecting an affine transformation to a different spatial reference system.

IPoint MoveOrigin_2 { get; }

Property Value

IPoint
